name: Evergrow Group
description: The company, EverGrow, produces one million tons of specialty fertilizers and chemicals annually, including significant quantities of potassium sulfate, calcium chloride, and NPK. They emphasize high-quality standards and sustainable practices, highlighting the crucial role of fertilizers in enhancing agricultural productivity to meet global food demands.

name: Suez Company For Fertilizers Production SCFP
description: SCFP is a manufacturer that specializes in producing a variety of agricultural fertilizers, such as single super phosphate, ammonium sulfate, and di calcium phosphate. The company's commitment to enhancing the fertilizers industry is evident through its focus on customer satisfaction and extensive market research.

name: AlexFert
description: AlexFert is an Egyptian joint stock company that specializes in the production of nitrogen-based fertilizers, primarily Granular Urea and Anhydrous Ammonia. With a strong production capacity and a commitment to sustainable practices, AlexFert positions itself as a key supplier in the fertilizer market, targeting European, American, and African markets.

name: KGSIndustry
description: KGS Industry specializes in agricultural fertilizers that are crucial for enhancing soil fertility and boosting crop productivity. Their products are designed for rapid growth and sustainable farming practices, making them a leading provider of fertilizers in Egypt.

name: Tetra Group Fertilizers
description: The company specializes in producing high-quality specialty fertilizers for fertigation and foliar nutrition, offering a wide range of liquid and water-soluble products that cater to various crop needs. Their commitment to quality and innovation establishes them as a leader in the fertilizer sector.

name: Kayan Group
description: The company specializes in agribusiness, focusing on providing a range of products and services aimed at enhancing food production and improving crop quality for farmers. With expertise in agrochemicals and fertilizers, the company leverages advanced technologies to support farmers in achieving their goals.

name: Egyptian French Company for Plant Tissue Culture S.A.E
description: The Egyptian French Company for Plant Tissue Culture S.A.E (EFC Plants) specializes in plant tissue culture and research, focusing on the micropropagation of various plants.

name: Future for Agricultural Materials
description: Future for Agricultural Materials (FAMCO) in Egypt specializes in fertilizers, offering high-quality products designed to enhance crop quality and yield. Their expertise and skilled team ensure farmers have access to essential agricultural materials that support effective crop production.

name: Eco Agro Science
description: Eco Agro is a manufacturer that specializes in innovative fertilizers, particularly highlighting their Eco Fol product, which is an integral fertilizer containing essential macro and micro elements. This high-solubility fertilizer promotes plant growth at all stages, making it ideal for vegetables, field crops, and early fruit development.

name: RAWAG for Industry and Trade
description: RAWAG Business is a specialized manufacturer and supplier of fertilizers, particularly focusing on Single Super Phosphate and other mineral products like Rock Phosphate and Limestone. With nearly 15 years of experience and ISO 9001 certification, the company ensures high-quality agricultural inputs for expanding markets.

name: valor for chemicals and fertilizers
description: Valor is a manufacturer specializing in agricultural solutions, offering a diverse range of high-quality fertilizers designed to enhance crop productivity and environmental sustainability.

name: Dakahlia Group
description: Shams Chemicals is a prominent manufacturer and distributor of agricultural chemicals, including high-quality fertilizers. The company emphasizes premium quality and consistency in its products, making it a reliable partner in the agricultural inputs market.

name: EgyptSupplier
description: The company, Ahmed Hafez, Egypt Supplier, specializes in the export of fresh fruits, vegetables, and herbs, ensuring high-quality supplies and prompt processing of shipments. With over 13 years of experience and a commitment to quality, they are a reliable partner for producers in the fresh produce industry.

name: Damak for agricultural development
description: The company specializes in agricultural chemicals and offers "King Flower Total Agro," a specialized fertilizer designed to enhance flowering and fruit set. This product contains essential macro and micronutrients, free amino acids, vitamins, and auxins, which collectively improve plant resilience against environmental stresses and significantly increase yield during critical growth phases.

name: CENTECH -Industrial Technical Center
description: Centech is a prominent importer and distributor of specialty fertilizers in Egypt, with a focus on NPK products. Their Agrowmore 10-52-10 fertilizer is particularly noteworthy for its high phosphorus content, which is essential for various vital plant processes, thereby enhancing agricultural production.

name: Plug'n'Grow
description: Plug’n’Grow is a technology company that specializes in advanced and sustainable agricultural solutions, including hydroponic and aquaponic systems. Their innovations focus on maximizing crop yields while minimizing production costs, which directly supports efficient and profitable agricultural practices.

name: Mashtal Garden Centers
description: Mashtal offers a balanced NPK fertilizer (20:20:20+TE) that enhances plant growth at all stages, providing essential nutrients and trace elements that promote photosynthesis and overall plant health. This product can be used both through watering and as a foliar spray, making it a versatile option for gardeners.

name: Agro Alex Group
description: Agro Alex Group is a prominent Egyptian producer and exporter of fresh fruits and vegetables, with a commitment to sustainable farming practices and high-quality products. Their extensive experience and GLOBALG.A.P certification highlight their dedication to agricultural innovation and quality control, which are essential in the competitive market.

name: Farm Pick
description: Farm Pick is a manufacturer and exporter that emphasizes environmental sustainability in its operations, which is crucial for high-quality agricultural production. With two decades of experience, the company controls the entire supply chain, ensuring premium quality fresh produce for international markets.

name: Soltaire for Agriculture & Industrial Chemicals co.
description: Soltaire is a leading manufacturer of agricultural chemicals, providing a variety of products that support and protect food resources. Their offerings include innovative solutions that enhance agricultural processes, making them a key player in the sector.

name: ECS-Egyption Company For Supplies
description: E.C.S is an Egyptian company that specializes in innovative water management and irrigation solutions, offering a range of products including fertilization systems like AZUD QGROW. Their focus on smart irrigation technology enhances agricultural production efficiency, making them a key player in promoting sustainable practices in landscaping and agriculture.

name: Chema Industries
description: Chema Industries is a prominent manufacturer of fertilizers, offering products like Agrofeed Chema, a foliar fertilizer with a balanced NPK composition of 19% each of nitrogen, phosphorus, and potassium. This formulation is designed to enhance plant growth and development, making it suitable for field crops, vegetables, and orchards.

name: Mediterranean Agricultural Products Company (MAPCO)
description: Mapco is a prominent manufacturer and exporter of premium-grade, sustainably-cultivated fruits and vegetables from Egypt, emphasizing advanced agricultural technologies and sustainable practices. The company's commitment to quality and innovation in agriculture supports reliable food production and delivery.

name: El Saied for trading and distribution
description: El-Saied for Trading and Distributing is a prominent manufacturer and distributor of fertilizers in Egypt, offering a range of high-quality products, including SUPER Phosphate Granular and various other fertilizers. With a strong delivery network and strategic partnerships, the company ensures reliable access to essential agricultural solutions for its customers.

name: El Hefnawy For Chemicals (EHC)
description: EHC is a manufacturer that specializes in innovative specialty fertilizers for agriculture, offering a diverse range of products like foliar nutrition solutions and silicate fertilizers enriched with microelements. The company emphasizes quality through advanced technology and rigorous analysis of raw materials and soil.

name: MayTrade
description: MayTrade is a key player in the agricultural sector in Egypt, specializing in high-quality plant protection products. With over 35 years of experience and partnerships with major suppliers like Bayer and UPL, the company is committed to enhancing agricultural productivity for Egyptian growers.

name: Ennabta Farms LLC
description: Ennabta Farms prioritizes sustainable farming by utilizing aquaponics technology, which eliminates the use of inorganic fertilizers and chemical pesticides, ensuring their produce is fresh and chemical-free. This commitment to environmentally friendly practices supports healthy eating and promotes community wellbeing through access to organic vegetables.

name: ExpoMisrTrade
description: The company specializes in the sieving and cleaning of high-quality Egyptian farm products, including a diverse range of seeds such as fenugreek and clover, which are essential for agricultural purposes. They are committed to ensuring their products meet client specifications and adhere to organic standards.

name: Agro Pure Eg
description: AGRO PURE is a specialized manufacturer and service provider that manages the entire supply chain for agricultural crops, ensuring high quality from harvesting to logistics. Their commitment to quality and end-to-end solutions positions them as a reliable partner in the agricultural sector.

name: Shatla Sky
description: Shatla Sky offers a Humic fertilizer that is rich in potassium, designed to enhance soil quality and boost plant growth by 65%. Their scientifically proven formula provides essential nutrients for optimal plant health, making it a valuable resource for sustainable agricultural practices.

name: ‪Earth Bounty‬‏
description: Earth Bounty is an agricultural exporter based in Egypt, dedicated to sustainable farming practices and offering a variety of high-quality vegetable products. Their commitment to excellence and innovation in agriculture supports both local and international market demands, promoting healthier lifestyles through nutrient-rich offerings.

name: AgriCBS
description: AgriCBS is an application that supports various aspects of the agricultural sector, including the supply of fertilizers. The platform enhances communication and resources for those involved in the distribution of agricultural products.

name: F&M Petroleum Exploration Services
description: F&M Petroleum Exploration Services is a prominent provider in the oil and gas industry, offering a range of specialized equipment and services that could be relevant for those in need of production supplies. Their commitment to innovative solutions and technical support may be beneficial for clients seeking effective and environmentally responsible options in the energy market.

name: GrowPro EG
description: Grow Pro offers a specially formulated Hydroponic Nutrient Solution A+B designed for fruiting greens, providing essential elements for robust growth and abundant yields. This nutrient solution enhances hydroponic gardening, promoting healthy roots and vigorous foliage for crops like lettuce and kale.

name: Agritrade for Export & Trading Agencies
description: Agritrade is a key player in the agricultural trade industry, specializing in the sourcing and delivery of essential products, including a diverse portfolio of fertilizers. With a commitment to quality and sustainability, Agritrade ensures reliable supply chain solutions and custom fertilizer blends to meet the needs of clients worldwide.

name: Hydrogreen Landscaping
description: Hydrogreen specializes in landscaping and irrigation systems, offering a comprehensive range of planting supplies, including trees, palms, shrubs, and grass. Their expertise in designing customized irrigation systems ensures the preservation and beauty of lawns, making them a trusted source for high-quality landscaping services.

name: Inagrotiba
description: InagroTiba is a manufacturer based in Egypt that specializes in producing high-quality dehydrated herbs and vegetables. Their strategic partnership with Green Hills enhances their ability to export a diverse range of dehydrated products, which may indicate a focus on sustainable agricultural practices that could relate to fertilizer use in their supply chain.

name: Agrocorp for Agricultural Investment
description: Agrocorp is a manufacturer that specializes in high-quality processed food products, particularly artichokes. With a strong commitment to safety and quality, the company has invested in advanced manufacturing technologies and traceability systems.

name: Justsbr
description: The company specializes in the apparel and fashion sector, aiming to enhance customer experiences through a curated selection of premium brands. They feature Just SBR, a local Egyptian fashion brand offering high-quality women's wear, including a diverse collection of pants, tops, and jackets.

name: Corporate Fashion By Bishara
description: The company specializes in high-quality uniforms and workwear, emphasizing fit, functionality, style, comfort, and durability, making their garments suitable for various uniform programs. With a focus on custom design and corporate image consulting, they have been a leader in corporate uniforms since 1999, serving prestigious clients across multiple sectors.

name: T&C Garments
description: T&C Garments specializes in manufacturing denim garments for leading global brands, highlighting its commitment to innovation and quality through advanced technology and a skilled team. With a production capacity of 18,000 pieces daily, it ranks among the top apparel exporting companies worldwide.

name: MEN'S CLUB
description: Men's Club is a specialized menswear manufacturer that offers a wide variety of clothing, including T-shirts, jackets, pants, and shirts, all designed to reflect the latest fashion trends.

name: LOTUS GARMENTS CO.
description: LOTUS GARMENTS CO. is a leading manufacturer of jeans and apparel, producing over 20 million units annually for top brands like Levi’s and Polo Ralph Lauren. They specialize in denim and non-denim bottoms for men, women, and kids, emphasizing innovation and sustainability in their production processes.

name: Calik Alexandria For Ready Made Garments
description: Çalık Alexandria for Ready Made Garments is a prominent manufacturer of fashionable ready-made clothing, with a significant production capacity of 250,000 denim pieces and 300,000 knitted items per month. Their strong supply chain and commitment to quality enable them to meet diverse customer tastes at competitive prices.

name: 2S HomeWear
description: 2S Egypt is a prominent retailer in Egypt that specializes in home wear products, offering a wide range of clothing items including pajamas, leggings, and thermal wear for women, men, and kids. Their commitment to quality and variety ensures that customers have access to over 1,200 products, making it a key destination for diverse clothing needs.

name: SHEEBA INTERNATIONAL GARMENTS
description: Sheeba Garments is a prominent manufacturer and exporter of high-quality apparel in Egypt, serving primarily the US and European markets. The company emphasizes advanced machinery and technical expertise to maintain superior manufacturing standards.

name: Mlameh
description: Mlameh Fashion is a well-established Egyptian brand that specializes in stylish clothing for women and children, offering a diverse range of apparel to meet various fashion needs. Their collection includes trendy options for every occasion, highlighting new arrivals and exclusive seasonal styles.

name: Embrator
description: Embrator, a brand under Sammakia Bros. Co., specializes in the production of circular knitting-based clothing, particularly men's underwear, home wear, and socks, while also offering a modern line of streetwear for youth. They emphasize high-quality materials, such as Egyptian cotton, and a commitment to comfort and innovation in their diverse product range.

name: Jodyshop Shopping
description: Jodyshop is a dedicated online marketplace that offers a diverse selection of clothing, including a Thanksgiving shirt for women. With a focus on fashion for all ages and detailed product reviews, the company helps customers make informed purchasing decisions.

name: B2B Matchmaking
description: B2B Matchmaking is a service provider that enhances trade and consulting within Africa, creating communication channels between exporters and importers. They also organize events, which may include showcasing products like the PORTO T-SHIRT.

name: Wajoor
description: The company is an e-commerce platform focused on fashion, offering a diverse range of apparel and accessories for women. Their collection includes various styles, from dresses and tops to jackets and sweaters, catering to different fashion preferences and trends.
